name: Sook's Famous "Christmas Memory" Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fruits and nuts into small pieces, then coat them with some flour.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar; add one egg at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the remaining flour.
4. Add the floured fruits and nuts, along with the spices (nutmeg, cloves), grated chocolate, grape jelly, grape juice, bourbon whisky, cinnamon, and allspice.
5. Mix by hand until combined.
6. Grease a large cake tin with butter, then line it with wax paper.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and place it in a steamer set over cold water.
8. Cover the steamer and bring the water to a rolling boil.
9. Reduce the heat and steam the cake for about four-and-one-half hours.
10. Preheat the oven to 250°F (around) and bake for one hour.
